shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character default running state during active gameplay
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0px (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Primary animation during gameplay when player is grounded and not ducking

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur in running pose with alternating leg positions
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, no gradients

animation.description: Running cycle - frame 1: left leg forward, frame 2: right leg forward. Total duration: 0.167 seconds per loop. Seamless loop required

visual_specification.details: Legs alternate in running motion, body slightly leaned forward, tail extended for balance, eyes focused ahead

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions and base pose as player_idle, same color scheme as all player states
relationships.differences_from: player_idle has slower animation (6 FPS vs 12 FPS), player_jump is static, player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px)

explicit_negations: No dust particles or trail effects
No transparency except full alpha channel
No scaling or stretching between frames
